questions.question: How many customers are there in each region?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT region, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customers GROUP BY region ORDER BY customer_count DESC

questions.question: What is the breakdown of customers by plan type?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT plan, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customers GROUP BY plan ORDER BY customer_count DESC

questions.question: How many customers signed up in 2024?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS customers_2024 FROM customers WHERE joined >= '2024-01-01' AND joined < '2025-01-01'

questions.question: Which sales rep manages the most customers?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT rep, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customers WHERE rep IS NOT NULL GROUP BY rep ORDER BY customer_count DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: How many customers have no sales rep?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS self_serve_count FROM customers WHERE rep IS NULL

questions.question: What is the most common plan in the West region?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT plan, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM customers WHERE region = 'West' GROUP BY plan ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: How many customers signed up each month in 2023?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', joined) AS month, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customers WHERE joined >= '2023-01-01' AND joined < '2024-01-01' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

questions.question: Which region has the most enterprise customers?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT region, COUNT(*) AS enterprise_count FROM customers WHERE plan = 'enterprise' GROUP BY region ORDER BY enterprise_count DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: How many products are in each category?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT cat, COUNT(*) AS product_count FROM products GROUP BY cat ORDER BY product_count DESC

questions.question: What is the average list price in dollars by product category?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT cat, ROUND(AVG(price) / 100.0, 2) AS avg_price_dollars FROM products GROUP BY cat ORDER BY avg_price_dollars DESC

questions.question: Which product has the highest list price?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT sku, product, ROUND(price / 100.0, 2) AS price_dollars FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: How many products have a list price above $200?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS expensive_product_count FROM products WHERE price > 20000

questions.question: What is the cheapest product in each category?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat, p.product, ROUND(p.price / 100.0, 2) AS price_dollars
        FROM products p
        JOIN (SELECT cat, MIN(price) AS min_price FROM products GROUP BY cat) m
          ON p.cat = m.cat AND p.price = m.min_price
        ORDER BY p.cat

questions.question: How many orders were placed in 2024?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS orders_2024 FROM orders WHERE dt >= '2024-01-01' AND dt < '2025-01-01'

questions.question: What is the total revenue across all orders in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS total_revenue_dollars FROM orders

questions.question: What is the overall refund rate as a percentage?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(refunded) / COUNT(*), 2) AS refund_rate_pct FROM orders

questions.question: What is the total revenue by month in 2024 in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', dt) AS month, ROUND(SUM(revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders WHERE dt >= '2024-01-01' AND dt < '2025-01-01'
        GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

questions.question: How many orders included a discount?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS discounted_order_count FROM orders WHERE discount > 0

questions.question: What is the average discount percentage on discounted orders?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(discount) * 100, 2) AS avg_discount_pct FROM orders WHERE discount > 0

questions.question: What is the distribution of order quantities?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT qty, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY qty ORDER BY qty

questions.question: How many orders were placed each year?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', dt) AS year, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY year ORDER BY year

questions.question: What is the highest revenue from a single order in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT ROUND(MAX(revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS max_order_revenue_dollars FROM orders

questions.question: What is the total number of units sold across all orders?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT SUM(qty) AS total_units_sold FROM orders

questions.question: How many orders were refunded in each quarter of 2024?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT 'Q' || CAST((CAST(strftime('%m', dt) AS INTEGER) + 2) / 3 AS TEXT) AS quarter,
               COUNT(*) AS refunded_count
        FROM orders WHERE dt >= '2024-01-01' AND dt < '2025-01-01' AND refunded = 1
        GROUP BY quarter ORDER BY quarter

questions.question: What is the average revenue per order in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS avg_order_revenue_dollars FROM orders

questions.question: What is the total revenue by customer region in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.region, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
        GROUP BY c.region ORDER BY revenue_dollars DESC

questions.question: What is the average order value by plan type in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.plan, ROUND(AVG(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS avg_order_value_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
        GROUP BY c.plan ORDER BY avg_order_value_dollars DESC

questions.question: Which plan type has the highest refund rate?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.plan, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(o.refunded) / COUNT(*), 2) AS refund_rate_pct
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
        GROUP BY c.plan ORDER BY refund_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: Who are the top 5 customers by total spend in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.name, c.plan, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS total_spend_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
        GROUP BY c.cust_id ORDER BY total_spend_dollars DESC LIMIT 5

questions.question: How many orders did each sales rep close?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.rep, COUNT(*) AS order_count
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
        WHERE c.rep IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.rep ORDER BY order_count DESC

questions.question: What is the total revenue from enterprise plan customers in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS enterprise_revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
        WHERE c.plan = 'enterprise'

questions.question: What is the average discount percentage by plan type?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.plan, ROUND(AVG(o.discount) * 100, 2) AS avg_discount_pct
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
        GROUP BY c.plan ORDER BY avg_discount_pct DESC

questions.question: How many customers from each region have placed more than 3 orders?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.region, COUNT(*) AS customer_count
        FROM customers c
        WHERE c.cust_id IN (SELECT cust_id FROM orders GROUP BY cust_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 3)
        GROUP BY c.region ORDER BY customer_count DESC

questions.question: What is the total revenue from self-serve versus rep-assisted orders in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT CASE WHEN c.rep IS NULL THEN 'Self-serve' ELSE 'Rep-assisted' END AS order_type,
               ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
        GROUP BY order_type ORDER BY order_type

questions.question: Which region has the highest refund rate?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.region, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(o.refunded) / COUNT(*), 2) AS refund_rate_pct
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
        GROUP BY c.region ORDER BY refund_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: What is the total revenue from customers who signed up in 2023 in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
        WHERE c.joined >= '2023-01-01' AND c.joined < '2024-01-01'

questions.question: How many orders were placed by customers in each region in 2024?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.region, COUNT(*) AS order_count
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
        WHERE o.dt >= '2024-01-01' AND o.dt < '2025-01-01'
        GROUP BY c.region ORDER BY order_count DESC

questions.question: Which sales rep has the highest average order value in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.rep, ROUND(AVG(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS avg_order_value_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
        WHERE c.rep IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.rep ORDER BY avg_order_value_dollars DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: What is the total revenue by product category in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.cat ORDER BY revenue_dollars DESC

questions.question: Which product has generated the most total revenue in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.product, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS total_revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.sku ORDER BY total_revenue_dollars DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: What is the refund rate by product category?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(o.refunded) / COUNT(*), 2) AS refund_rate_pct
        FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.cat ORDER BY refund_rate_pct DESC

questions.question: What are the top 5 products by number of orders?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.product, COUNT(*) AS order_count
        FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.sku ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 5

questions.question: How many total units of each product category have been sold?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat, SUM(o.qty) AS total_units
        FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.cat ORDER BY total_units DESC

questions.question: What is the average revenue per order by product category in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat, ROUND(AVG(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS avg_revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.cat ORDER BY avg_revenue_dollars DESC

questions.question: What is the total revenue from Software products in 2024 in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE p.cat = 'Software' AND o.dt >= '2024-01-01' AND o.dt < '2025-01-01'

questions.question: What is the average discount percentage by product category?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat, ROUND(AVG(o.discount) * 100, 2) AS avg_discount_pct
        FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.cat ORDER BY avg_discount_pct DESC

questions.question: Which product category has the highest average order quantity?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat, ROUND(AVG(o.qty), 2) AS avg_qty
        FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.cat ORDER BY avg_qty DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: What is the most ordered product?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.product, COUNT(*) AS order_count
        FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.sku ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: What is the total revenue from Hardware products ordered after 2023 in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE p.cat = 'Hardware' AND o.dt >= '2024-01-01'

questions.question: How many distinct customers have ordered from each product category?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat, COUNT(DISTINCT o.cust_id) AS customer_count
        FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.cat ORDER BY customer_count DESC

questions.question: What is the total revenue by customer region and product category in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.region, p.cat, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY c.region, p.cat ORDER BY c.region, revenue_dollars DESC

questions.question: Which sales rep generates the most revenue from Software products in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.rep, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE c.rep IS NOT NULL AND p.cat = 'Software'
        GROUP BY c.rep ORDER BY revenue_dollars DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: What is the refund rate by plan type and product category?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.plan, p.cat, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(o.refunded) / COUNT(*), 2) AS refund_rate_pct
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY c.plan, p.cat ORDER BY c.plan, refund_rate_pct DESC

questions.question: Who are the top 5 customers by spend on Hardware products in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.name, c.plan, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS hardware_spend_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE p.cat = 'Hardware'
        GROUP BY c.cust_id ORDER BY hardware_spend_dollars DESC LIMIT 5

questions.question: What is the average order value by region and product category in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.region, p.cat, ROUND(AVG(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS avg_order_value_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY c.region, p.cat ORDER BY c.region, avg_order_value_dollars DESC

questions.question: What is the total revenue from enterprise customers on Hardware products in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE c.plan = 'enterprise' AND p.cat = 'Hardware'

questions.question: How does revenue from self-serve versus rep-assisted orders break down by product category in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat,
               CASE WHEN c.rep IS NULL THEN 'Self-serve' ELSE 'Rep-assisted' END AS order_type,
               ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.cat, order_type ORDER BY p.cat, order_type

questions.question: What is the total revenue by plan type and product category in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.plan, p.cat, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY c.plan, p.cat ORDER BY c.plan, revenue_dollars DESC

questions.question: Which product category is most ordered by free plan customers?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat, COUNT(*) AS order_count
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE c.plan = 'free' GROUP BY p.cat ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: What is the total revenue from pro and enterprise customers on Software products in 2024 in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE c.plan IN ('pro', 'enterprise') AND p.cat = 'Software'
          AND o.dt >= '2024-01-01' AND o.dt < '2025-01-01'

questions.question: What is the total number of units sold by product category and customer region?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat, c.region, SUM(o.qty) AS total_units
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.cat, c.region ORDER BY p.cat, total_units DESC

questions.question: What is the average discount given to enterprise customers by product category?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat, ROUND(AVG(o.discount) * 100, 2) AS avg_discount_pct
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE c.plan = 'enterprise' GROUP BY p.cat ORDER BY avg_discount_pct DESC

questions.question: Which region has the highest revenue from Software products in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.region, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE p.cat = 'Software' GROUP BY c.region ORDER BY revenue_dollars DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: Which sales rep has closed the most orders for enterprise customers buying Hardware?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.rep, COUNT(*) AS order_count
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE c.plan = 'enterprise' AND p.cat = 'Hardware' AND c.rep IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY c.rep ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: What is the average order value for starter plan customers buying Software in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS avg_order_value_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE c.plan = 'starter' AND p.cat = 'Software'

questions.question: What is the total revenue from customers in the South region who ordered Hardware in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE c.region = 'South' AND p.cat = 'Hardware'

questions.question: Which plan type spends the most on Support products in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.plan, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE p.cat = 'Support' GROUP BY c.plan ORDER BY revenue_dollars DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: How many orders from pro plan customers for Software products included a discount?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS discounted_order_count
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE c.plan = 'pro' AND p.cat = 'Software' AND o.discount > 0

questions.question: What is the revenue contribution of each product category in the East region in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE c.region = 'East' GROUP BY p.cat ORDER BY revenue_dollars DESC

questions.question: Which sales rep has the highest refund rate for Software products?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.rep, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(o.refunded) / COUNT(*), 2) AS refund_rate_pct
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE c.rep IS NOT NULL AND p.cat = 'Software'
        GROUP BY c.rep ORDER BY refund_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: What is the total revenue from non-refunded orders by region and category in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.region, p.cat, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE o.refunded = 0
        GROUP BY c.region, p.cat ORDER BY c.region, revenue_dollars DESC

questions.question: How many distinct customers from each plan type have ordered Services products?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.plan, COUNT(DISTINCT o.cust_id) AS customer_count
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE p.cat = 'Services' GROUP BY c.plan ORDER BY customer_count DESC

questions.question: What is the average quantity per order by product category for enterprise customers?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat, ROUND(AVG(o.qty), 2) AS avg_qty
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE c.plan = 'enterprise' GROUP BY p.cat ORDER BY avg_qty DESC

questions.question: What is the total discount amount given by product category and region in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat, c.region,
               ROUND(SUM(o.qty * o.unit_price * o.discount) / 100.0, 2) AS total_discount_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.cat, c.region ORDER BY p.cat, total_discount_dollars DESC

questions.question: Which region and product category combination has the highest average order value in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.region, p.cat, ROUND(AVG(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS avg_order_value_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY c.region, p.cat ORDER BY avg_order_value_dollars DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: For each region, which product category generates the highest revenue?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT region, cat, revenue_dollars FROM (
            SELECT c.region, p.cat, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars,
                   RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY c.region ORDER BY SUM(o.revenue) DESC) AS rnk
            FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
            GROUP BY c.region, p.cat
        ) WHERE rnk = 1 ORDER BY region

questions.question: Which customers have a total spend above the average customer spend?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.name, c.plan, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS total_spend_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
        GROUP BY c.cust_id
        HAVING SUM(o.revenue) > (
            SELECT AVG(cust_rev) FROM (SELECT SUM(revenue) AS cust_rev FROM orders GROUP BY cust_id)
        )
        ORDER BY total_spend_dollars DESC

questions.question: Which products have a refund rate higher than the overall average?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.product, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(o.refunded) / COUNT(*), 2) AS refund_rate_pct
        FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.sku
        HAVING (100.0 * SUM(o.refunded) / COUNT(*)) > (
            SELECT 100.0 * SUM(refunded) / COUNT(*) FROM orders
        )
        ORDER BY refund_rate_pct DESC

questions.question: For each sales rep, what percentage of their revenue comes from Software products?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.rep,
               ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN p.cat = 'Software' THEN o.revenue ELSE 0 END) / SUM(o.revenue), 2) AS software_revenue_pct
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE c.rep IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.rep ORDER BY software_revenue_pct DESC

questions.question: What is the cumulative revenue by month in 2024 in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT month, monthly_revenue_dollars,
               ROUND(SUM(monthly_revenue_dollars) OVER (ORDER BY month), 2) AS cumulative_revenue_dollars
        FROM (
            SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', dt) AS month, ROUND(SUM(revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS monthly_revenue_dollars
            FROM orders WHERE dt >= '2024-01-01' AND dt < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY month
        ) ORDER BY month

questions.question: For each plan type, rank the product categories by total revenue.
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT plan, cat, revenue_dollars,
               RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY plan ORDER BY revenue_dollars DESC) AS revenue_rank
        FROM (
            SELECT c.plan, p.cat, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
            FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
            GROUP BY c.plan, p.cat
        ) ORDER BY plan, revenue_rank

questions.question: Which customers have placed orders in every product category?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.name, c.plan
        FROM customers c
        WHERE (
            SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.cat)
            FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
            WHERE o.cust_id = c.cust_id
        ) = (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cat) FROM products)
        ORDER BY c.name

questions.question: For each product category, which month in 2024 had the highest revenue?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT cat, month, revenue_dollars FROM (
            SELECT p.cat, strftime('%Y-%m', o.dt) AS month,
                   ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars,
                   RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY p.cat ORDER BY SUM(o.revenue) DESC) AS rnk
            FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
            WHERE o.dt >= '2024-01-01' AND o.dt < '2025-01-01'
            GROUP BY p.cat, month
        ) WHERE rnk = 1 ORDER BY cat

questions.question: Which customers placed their first order within 30 days of signing up?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.name, c.plan, c.joined, MIN(o.dt) AS first_order_date
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
        GROUP BY c.cust_id
        HAVING julianday(MIN(o.dt)) - julianday(c.joined) <= 30
        ORDER BY c.name

questions.question: What is the total revenue from repeat customers versus first-time buyers in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT CASE WHEN order_count > 1 THEN 'Repeat' ELSE 'First-time' END AS customer_type,
               ROUND(SUM(total_revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM (
            SELECT cust_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue
            FROM orders GROUP BY cust_id
        ) GROUP BY customer_type ORDER BY customer_type

questions.question: For each region, which sales rep has generated the most revenue?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT region, rep, revenue_dollars FROM (
            SELECT c.region, c.rep, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars,
                   RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY c.region ORDER BY SUM(o.revenue) DESC) AS rnk
            FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
            WHERE c.rep IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.region, c.rep
        ) WHERE rnk = 1 ORDER BY region

questions.question: Which customers have only ever ordered from a single product category?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.name, c.plan, MAX(p.cat) AS only_category
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY c.cust_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT p.cat) = 1
        ORDER BY c.name

questions.question: For each product category, what percentage of its revenue came from discounted orders?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat,
               ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN o.discount > 0 THEN o.revenue ELSE 0 END) / SUM(o.revenue), 2) AS discounted_revenue_pct
        FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.cat ORDER BY discounted_revenue_pct DESC

questions.question: Which plan type had the largest increase in order count from 2023 to 2024?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT plan, orders_2024 - orders_2023 AS order_count_increase FROM (
            SELECT c.plan,
                SUM(CASE WHEN o.dt >= '2023-01-01' AND o.dt < '2024-01-01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS orders_2023,
                SUM(CASE WHEN o.dt >= '2024-01-01' AND o.dt < '2025-01-01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS orders_2024
            FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id GROUP BY c.plan
        ) ORDER BY order_count_increase DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: Who is the top spending customer in each region?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT region, name, plan, total_spend_dollars FROM (
            SELECT c.region, c.name, c.plan,
                   ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS total_spend_dollars,
                   RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY c.region ORDER BY SUM(o.revenue) DESC) AS rnk
            FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
            GROUP BY c.region, c.cust_id
        ) WHERE rnk = 1 ORDER BY region

questions.question: What is the average number of days between a customer's signup date and their first order?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(days_to_first_order), 1) AS avg_days_to_first_order FROM (
            SELECT julianday(MIN(o.dt)) - julianday(c.joined) AS days_to_first_order
            FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id GROUP BY c.cust_id
        )

questions.question: Which products have been ordered by customers from all four regions?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.product
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.sku HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.region) = 4
        ORDER BY p.product

questions.question: What percentage of customers have placed more than one order?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN order_count > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS repeat_customer_pct
        FROM (SELECT cust_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY cust_id)

questions.question: What is the total revenue by quarter and product category in 2024 in dollars?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat,
               'Q' || CAST((CAST(strftime('%m', o.dt) AS INTEGER) + 2) / 3 AS TEXT) AS quarter,
               ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE o.dt >= '2024-01-01' AND o.dt < '2025-01-01'
        GROUP BY p.cat, quarter ORDER BY p.cat, quarter

questions.question: Which product category has the highest proportion of enterprise customer orders?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.cat,
               ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.plan = 'enterprise' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS enterprise_order_pct
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.cat ORDER BY enterprise_order_pct DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: Which customers have an average order value above the average for their plan type?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.name, c.plan, ROUND(AVG(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS avg_order_value_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id GROUP BY c.cust_id
        HAVING AVG(o.revenue) > (
            SELECT AVG(o2.revenue) FROM orders o2 JOIN customers c2 ON o2.cust_id = c2.cust_id
            WHERE c2.plan = c.plan
        )
        ORDER BY avg_order_value_dollars DESC

questions.question: Which month in 2024 had the highest revenue from non-refunded Hardware orders?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.dt) AS month, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE o.dt >= '2024-01-01' AND o.dt < '2025-01-01' AND o.refunded = 0 AND p.cat = 'Hardware'
        GROUP BY month ORDER BY revenue_dollars DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: For each sales rep, what is their best-performing product category by revenue?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT rep, cat, revenue_dollars FROM (
            SELECT c.rep, p.cat, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars,
                   RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY c.rep ORDER BY SUM(o.revenue) DESC) AS rnk
            FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
            WHERE c.rep IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.rep, p.cat
        ) WHERE rnk = 1 ORDER BY rep

questions.question: For each product, what proportion of its orders came from enterprise customers?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.product,
               ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.plan = 'enterprise' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS enterprise_order_pct
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.sku ORDER BY enterprise_order_pct DESC

questions.question: What is the average number of product categories ordered per customer, by plan type?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.plan, ROUND(AVG(cat_count), 2) AS avg_categories_per_customer
        FROM (
            SELECT o.cust_id, COUNT(DISTINCT p.cat) AS cat_count
            FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku GROUP BY o.cust_id
        ) sub JOIN customers c ON sub.cust_id = c.cust_id
        GROUP BY c.plan ORDER BY avg_categories_per_customer DESC

questions.question: What is our total revenue?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS total_revenue_dollars FROM orders

questions.question: What is a typical order worth?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS avg_order_revenue_dollars FROM orders

questions.question: Which customers spend the most?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.name, c.plan, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS total_spend_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id
        GROUP BY c.cust_id ORDER BY total_spend_dollars DESC LIMIT 5

questions.question: What is our best-selling product?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT p.product, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS total_revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        GROUP BY p.sku ORDER BY total_revenue_dollars DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: Who are our top hardware buyers?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.name, c.plan, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS hardware_spend_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE p.cat = 'Hardware'
        GROUP BY c.cust_id ORDER BY hardware_spend_dollars DESC LIMIT 5

questions.question: Which region is biggest for software?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.region, ROUND(SUM(o.revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.cust_id = c.cust_id JOIN products p ON o.sku = p.sku
        WHERE p.cat = 'Software' GROUP BY c.region ORDER BY revenue_dollars DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: How does revenue split between loyal and one-off customers?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT CASE WHEN order_count > 1 THEN 'Repeat' ELSE 'First-time' END AS customer_type,
               ROUND(SUM(total_revenue) / 100.0, 2) AS revenue_dollars
        FROM (
            SELECT cust_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue
            FROM orders GROUP BY cust_id
        ) GROUP BY customer_type ORDER BY customer_type

questions.question: How many of our customers come back for more?
questions.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN order_count > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS repeat_customer_pct
        FROM (SELECT cust_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY cust_id)

questions.question: What plan is popular out west?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT plan, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM customers WHERE region = 'West' GROUP BY plan ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: Where are our enterprise customers concentrated?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT region, COUNT(*) AS enterprise_count FROM customers WHERE plan = 'enterprise' GROUP BY region ORDER BY enterprise_count DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: What's our premium product?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT sku, product, ROUND(price / 100.0, 2) AS price_dollars FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: How did sales volume look last year?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS orders_2024 FROM orders WHERE dt >= '2024-01-01' AND dt < '2025-01-01'

questions.question: How is our order volume trending?
questions.ground_truth_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', dt) AS year, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY year ORDER BY year
